description_long: This is a rustic, partially cut loaf of bread with a thick, uneven brown crust and a dense, airy interior. The crust is rugged and deeply textured, showing natural cracks and a slightly flour-dusted appearance. The cut face reveals a pale, porous crumb structure with irregular holes, typical of artisanal or sourdough bread. The loaf is oblong and somewhat flattened, with a natural, hand-formed shape rather than a uniform, machine-made look. The exterior color ranges from deep golden brown to lighter tan, with some darker baked spots. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, hand-formed loaf of bread with a thick, cracked brown crust and a pale, airy interior. The cut end reveals a porous crumb typical of artisanal bread.
description_view_0: The loaf is seen from an angle showing the cut end, highlighting the pale, airy crumb and the thick, rugged crust.
description_view_1: A direct view of the cut face, clearly displaying the porous, irregular interior and the rough, browned crust edge.
description_view_2: The loaf is viewed from the opposite side, showing mostly the uncut, rounded crust with deep cracks and a rustic texture.
description_view_3: A top-down view of the loaf, emphasizing the elongated, uneven shape and the mottled, brown crust surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, rugged, and deeply cracked, with a natural, rustic appearance and some areas of flour dusting. There are no visible scores or seeds, giving it a hand-formed, artisanal look.
